tagline.en: The most different things to pick in one week!
tagline.da: Flest forskellige ting at plukke paa een uge!

theme.hero_task: Count how many different crops you harvest this week

tasks.action: Harvest festival walk: count different crop types picked

prompt.en: How many DIFFERENT things can you pick today? Tomatoes, raspberries, peppers, kale, beans, cucumbers...
prompt.da: Hvor mange FORSKELLIGE ting kan du plukke i dag? Tomater, hindbaer, peberfrugter, groenkal, boenner, agurker...

prompt.en: Late August -- nights are getting cooler but still water in the day!
prompt.da: Slutningen af august -- naetterne bliver koligere, men vand stadig om dagen!

tasks.action: Harvest broccoli side shoots from Bed E

prompt.en: After the big head was cut, the plant makes mini broccolis on the sides!
prompt.da: Efter det store hoved blev skaaret, laver planten mini-broccoli paa siderne!

prompt.en: Still raspberries! How many days in a row have you picked now?
prompt.da: Stadig hindbaer! Hvor mange dage i traek har du plukket nu?

tasks.action: Pull spent bush bean plants from Bed E (first sowing)

prompt.en: These bean plants are done -- pull them out. Leave the roots in the soil though!
prompt.da: De her boenneplanter er faerdige -- traek dem op. Lad roedderne sidde i jorden dog!

prompt.en: The Autumn Bliss name makes sense now -- autumn is coming and they're still fruiting!
prompt.da: Autumn Bliss-navnet giver mening nu -- efteraaret naermer sig og de baerer stadig frugt!

growth_events.event: Borage still producing blue star flowers, attracting bees

prompt.en: See the bees on the blue borage stars? They're collecting nectar!
prompt.da: Ser du bierne paa de blaa borago-stjerner? De samler nektar!
